cases.name: missing output is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 6 assembly is missing output for planned section "planned-concept-card-0".

cases.name: wrong output kind is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 6 output kind mismatch for planned section "planned-concept-card-0": expected "concept-card" but received "claim-card".

cases.name: failed coverage is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 6 cannot assemble planned section "planned-concept-card-0" because coverage status is failed.

cases.name: weak coverage is rejected by default
cases.expectError: Stage 6 cannot assemble planned section "planned-concept-card-0" because coverage status is weak and allowWeakSections is false.

cases.name: missing coverage result is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 6 coverage is missing planned section "planned-process-step-1".

cases.name: plan and source IDs must match
cases.expectError: Stage 6 source mismatch: plan source ID "different-source" does not match source ID "stage6-source".

cases.name: coverage and plan IDs must match
cases.expectError: Stage 6 coverage mismatch: coverage plan ID "different-plan" does not match plan ID "stage6-plan".

cases.name: output source block references must exist
cases.expectError: Stage 6 output for planned section "planned-concept-card-0" references missing source block ID "missing-block".

cases.name: planned source block references must exist
cases.expectError: Stage 6 planned section "planned-concept-card-0" references missing source block ID "missing-block".

cases.name: duplicate outputs are rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 6 assembly found multiple outputs for planned section "planned-concept-card-0".

cases.name: duplicate coverage results are rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 6 coverage contains multiple results for planned section "planned-concept-card-0".

cases.name: coverage is required
cases.expectError: Stage 6 assembly requires a coverage report.

cases.name: plan is required
cases.expectError: Stage 6 assembly requires a generation plan.

cases.name: source is required
cases.expectError: Stage 6 assembly requires a normalized source.

cases.name: empty plan sections are rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 6 assembly requires at least one planned section.

cases.name: empty coverage results are rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 6 assembly requires at least one coverage result.
